name: Patient 12
history: PhD student in science. Deep involvement in music (college band, jazz group). Offered jazz leadership but declined due to mental health concerns. Feels disconnected from scientific colleagues.
intermediate_belief: I have to choose between my passion and my career; I can't have both.
intermediate_belief_depression: My mental health makes me unreliable and limits my dreams.
situation: Offered leadership in jazz group but declined due to PhD work and mental health concerns.
auto_thought: "I'm letting down the music community. I'll never be good enough at either."
behavior: Skips jazz practice, procrastinates on PhD work, ruminates about the decision.
